prompt: EnumMap lookup always returns null. What is the bug?
choices: EnumMap.get() requires an int ordinal, not an enum constant
EnumMap<Dir, String> is keyed by Dir enum constants; passing the String "NORTH" to get() does not match any key and returns null
EnumMap does not support null values and throws NullPointerException
map.put must use the ordinal as the key: map.put(0, "up")
explanation: EnumMap<Dir, String> uses Dir constants as keys. Passing the String "NORTH" to get() does not match the Dir.NORTH key (different types), so it returns null. Fix: map.get(Dir.NORTH).
